languages.text: Нож по рукоять погружается в горло несчастного. Из заплывших гноем глаз скупо сочатся слезы облегчения.

traits.locale_text: Нож по рукоять погружается в горло несчастного. Из заплывших гноем глаз скупо сочатся слезы облегчения.

languages.text: The knife is driven to the hilt into the unfortunate man's throat. Tears of relief seep from his pus-filled eyes.
languages.original_text: Нож по рукоять погружается в горло несчастного. Из заплывших гноем глаз скупо сочатся слезы облегчения.

traits.locale_text: The knife is driven to the hilt into the unfortunate man's throat. Tears of relief seep from his pus-filled eyes.

The knife is driven to the hilt into the unfortunate man's throat. Tears of relief seep from his pus-filled eyes.

languages.text: 匕首齐根没入，刺进了那可怜人的喉咙。解脱的泪水从他满是脓液的眼眶中渗了出来。
languages.original_text: The knife is driven to the hilt into the unfortunate man's throat. Tears of relief seep from his pus-filled eyes.

traits.locale_text: 匕首齐根没入，刺进了那可怜人的喉咙。解脱的泪水从他满是脓液的眼眶中渗了出来。

languages.text: El cuchillo se clava hasta el pomo en la garganta del pobre hombre. Unas lágrimas de alivio escapan de sus ojos llenos de pus.
languages.original_text: The knife is driven to the hilt into the unfortunate man's throat. Tears of relief seep from his pus-filled eyes.

traits.locale_text: El cuchillo se clava hasta el pomo en la garganta del pobre hombre. Unas lágrimas de alivio escapan de sus ojos llenos de pus.

languages.text: Le couteau est enfoncé jusqu'à la garde dans la gorge du malheureux. Des larmes de soulagement s'écoulent de ses yeux gonflés de pus.
languages.original_text: The knife is driven to the hilt into the unfortunate man's throat. Tears of relief seep from his pus-filled eyes.

traits.locale_text: Le couteau est enfoncé jusqu'à la garde dans la gorge du malheureux. Des larmes de soulagement s'écoulent de ses yeux gonflés de pus.

languages.text: Bıçak, kabzasına kadar zavallı adamın boğazına saplanıyor. İltihaplı gözlerinden rahatlama gözyaşları sızıyor.
languages.original_text: The knife is driven to the hilt into the unfortunate man's throat. Tears of relief seep from his pus-filled eyes.

traits.locale_text: Bıçak, kabzasına kadar zavallı adamın boğazına saplanıyor. İltihaplı gözlerinden rahatlama gözyaşları sızıyor.

languages.text: Das Messer steckt bis zum Heft im Hals des bedauernswerten Mannes. Tränen der Erleichterung sickern aus seinen eitrigen Augen.
languages.original_text: The knife is driven to the hilt into the unfortunate man's throat. Tears of relief seep from his pus-filled eyes.

traits.locale_text: Das Messer steckt bis zum Heft im Hals des bedauernswerten Mannes. Tränen der Erleichterung sickern aus seinen eitrigen Augen.

languages.text: ナイフは不幸な男の喉に突き刺され、膿の詰まった彼の目から涙が流れ落ちる。
languages.original_text: The knife is driven to the hilt into the unfortunate man's throat. Tears of relief seep from his pus-filled eyes.

traits.locale_text: ナイフは不幸な男の喉に突き刺され、膿の詰まった彼の目から涙が流れ落ちる。
